title: Fresh True Diamonds
description: This pack make diamonds and items fresh and colourful.
body:
# Fresh True Diamonds

This pack makes diamond and diamond toold fresh and colourful.

### Includes
- Diamond Tools and Weapons
- Armors
- Trims

### Tools And Weapons
